items.step: Replace remaining tool-only specialist proof behavior with pure Zig tests where coverage must survive the stronger cut
items.notes: Portable-core and interpreter portability behavior now live in test/portability_contract_test.zig and run under zig build test without tool executables.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: added pure Zig portability coverage and removed the tool-based portability checks from the default bar.

items.step: Rewire build.zig so the surfaced contract is only zig build, zig build test, and zig build lint, with test_step depending on b.addTest suites only
items.notes: Named proof/check aliases, package-boundary proof step, shell proof steps, public-boundary proof steps, compile-fail step, and perf check steps are removed from the surfaced contract.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: build.zig now surfaces only install/uninstall/test/lint plus manual run/tool/bench steps, with test_step wired to Zig test suites only.

items.step: Delete the removed proof machinery and stale files that only served shell, nested-build, package-boundary, compile-fail, public-boundary, or perf-artifact proof surfaces
items.notes: Deleted shell scripts, proof tools, compile-fail fixtures, package-boundary fixtures, public-boundary checks, and perf artifact/stability files in the same wave.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: proof-only scripts, tools, baselines, compile-fail fixtures, and stale single-front/public-boundary surfaces were removed instead of demoted.

items.step: Rewrite README and tracked registries to match the exact stronger default contract and surviving manual run/tool/bench surfaces
items.notes: README now names only zig build, zig build test, and zig build lint as the default contract, and repo_zig_paths.txt was regenerated from the current Zig file set.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: README and repo_zig_paths.txt now match the reduced surface exactly.

items.step: Drive the stronger-cut branch to a fixed point with build/test/lint closure, de novo review, one-change challenge, learnings capture, commit, and push
items.notes: Closure bundle is zig build, zig build test --summary none, zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0, exhaustive review loop, then commit/push with SHA parity.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: stronger-cut branch is green under env ZIG_GLOBAL_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/zig-global ZIG_LOCAL_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/zig-local UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache for zig build, zig build test --summary none, and zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0; downstream temp consumer importing shift_compile fails as intended; native review transport remained non-authoritative, so code verdict is anchored to local proof plus direct downstream package check.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Fresh native codex review --base main completed with no discrete actionable regression after the stronger cut; final code verdict is ready with local proof and downstream import-failure receipt.
